attributes.action: Withdrawal of all military actions against the state of Iran
attributes.additional_details: These strikes violate international law, devastate civilian infrastructure, and risk a catastrophic regional war. We demand a return to diplomatic negotiations to prioritise peace, protect innocent lives, and ensure long-term stability for all people in the Middle East.
attributes.background: We demand the UK immediately cease all military involvement in "Operation Epic Fury" against Iran. By allowing US strikes from British bases and deploying the RAF, we risk a catastrophic regional war. Prioritise diplomacy and peace over escalation to protect lives and global stability.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
